rationale.R1.6: The artifact is a single prose block plagued by run-on sentences, inconsistent tense (mixing 'we are finding' / 'it had been showing' / 'we plan'), and repetitive conjunctive chaining ('and … and … and'). 'Clean this up' maps directly and exclusively onto sentence- and paragraph-level writing polish; failure to fix surface prose is the primary way this delegation could be invalidated. R1.5 is logged at 0.3 (peripheral) because resolving the run-ons may incidentally motivate minor clause reordering within sentences, but no structural reorganization of sections or narrative arc is requested or implied.
